# Scenario (c): pending-handoff-old-only
#
# Pre-state: project has `.ndf-pending-handoff` at the project root
# only. No `.ndf/cli/` directory exists. The marker also lives at
# OLD (`.ndf.json`) so the project is considered an NDF project for
# is-project purposes.
#
# Verifies: `pendingHandoffExists` returns true via the OLD-path
# fallback; `loadPendingHandoff` reads the body from OLD.
#
# Like (b), this is exercised indirectly — there is no direct CLI
# subcommand that loads/consumes the handoff outside of `ndf update`'s
# sentinel-skip branch. The fixture documents the layout the
# dual-path helpers must handle correctly.
